summary: Comprehensive backend testing of Innovagraf Growth System MVP. 36 pytest tests across all required endpoints all passed (100%). Verified auth (admin+comercial), public diagnostic flow (questions/submit/get) without auth, lead creation/kanban (8 statuses)/status changes/notes with activity log, meetings (with lead status side-effect to reunion_agendada), AI proposal generation with totals recomputation + PDF export, dashboard analytics (funnel of 8 statuses, services demand, 6-month trend), admin-only user CRUD with RBAC (403 for comercial), services catalog (7 seeded services), and 401/403 auth enforcement on protected routes. LLM-backed endpoints (diagnostic ai_summary, proposal generator) responded successfully within timeouts — fallback paths are also wired in code.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: GET /api/diagnostic/{id} is publicly accessible by id and returns the full diagnostic (incl. contact PII). Acceptable for MVP but consider signing the id or restricting to recently-created or owner-bound diagnostics in production.

Minor: POST /api/leads accepts owner_id implicitly via owner_id=user.id assignment but the LeadCreate model does not validate that the requesting user has permission to assign different owners (irrelevant for MVP but worth noting).
Minor: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'). Consider migrating to lifespan handlers — non-blocking.
Minor: GET /api/leads has no pagination — fine at MVP scale, but to_list(1000) cap could surprise later.

Code quality OK: UUID ids used throughout (no ObjectId leakage), all responses strip _id, async/await consistently applied, env vars sourced from .env, Pydantic input validation present, proper HTTP status codes.
test_credentials: admin@innovagraf.com / Innovagraf2026! (admin); ventas@innovagraf.com / Ventas2026! (comercial) — both verified working
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed leads/users/services and clean up users+services. Diagnostic lead from end-to-end flow remains in DB (used by subsequent meeting/proposal tests). Manual cleanup not done for diagnostic-created leads/meetings/proposals — acceptable for MVP testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_innovagraf_backend.py is the regression suite. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_innovagraf_backend.py -v. Note tests share state across classes via module-level pytest attributes (_diag_id, _diag_lead_id, _manual_lead_id, _meeting_id, _proposal_id) so run in declared order. AI endpoints respond in ~5-10s in this env; allow 60-120s timeouts. Frontend was not in scope for this iteration.
